instruction: Write a complete Solidity smart contract named SimpleVault using Solidity 0.8.20. You must use OpenZeppelin Ownable from `@openzeppelin/contracts/access/Ownable.sol`. Because this project uses OpenZeppelin v5, your contract must initialize ownership in the constructor with `Ownable(msg.sender)`. The contract must: 1. inherit from Ownable; 2. store a private uint256 value initialized to 0; 3. expose a public onlyOwner function setValue(uint256 newValue) that updates the stored value; 4. expose a public view function getValue() returns (uint256); 5. revert when a non-owner calls setValue. Return only the Solidity code in a single ```solidity``` block.
